docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON, SHERWIN AS TO DEFENDANT HEYMAN, CHRIS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF GARY A. BEMIS IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON, SHERWIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDON, SHERWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEYMAN, CHRIS $383,779.34 PRINCIPAL, $13,900.83 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $398,115.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
